name: AI-SKILL
description: 2200+ production-ready universal agent skills across 13+ domains, compatible with all major platforms. Curated from Anthropic Official Skills, Matt Pocock's Collection, Alireza Rezvani's 272 skills, Fullstack Skills, Antigravity Awesome Skills, AI Research Skills, Agent Skills Hub, and Agent Skills Library. Modified and enhanced by badhope.

metadata.description: The largest universal agent skill collection: 2200+ skills from multiple sources, curated, standardized, and enhanced for cross-platform compatibility.
metadata.author: Curated and modified by badhope
